scripts.backend:test: dotnet test backend/PawBuck.API.Tests/PawBuck.API.Tests.csproj && dotnet test backend/PawBuck.Shared.Tests/PawBuck.Shared.Tests.csproj && dotnet test backend/PawBuck.Admin.API.Tests/PawBuck.Admin.API.Tests.csproj
scripts.test:all: pnpm run milo:test && pnpm run api-client:test && pnpm run consumer:test && pnpm run provider:test && pnpm run admin:test && pnpm run backend:test
scripts.supabase:types: cd supabase && supabase gen types typescript --local > apps/consumer-app/database.types.ts
